# Chad the Flooring Guy — Woodbury, MN

> Expert flooring repair and installation. 20+ years insured. Anthony Marie LLC.

Chad Bublitz specializes in targeted flooring repairs that save homeowners thousands compared to full replacement. Serving Woodbury MN, Washington County, Stillwater, Hastings, Hudson WI, and the east Twin Cities metro.

## Services
- Carpet Repair & Re-Stretching (wrinkles, pet damage, seam repairs, radio-wave seaming)
- LVP & Vinyl Plank Repair (single-board replacement, click-lock fixes, water damage)
- Hardwood & Engineered Wood Repair (board replacement, scratch repair, refinishing)
- Floor Transition Repair (gaps between rooms, broken strips, uneven thresholds)
- New Flooring Installation (carpet, LVP, hardwood, engineered wood)

## Why Chad Saves You Money
- Transparent itemized quotes — see every line item, choose what to DIY
- Specialized tools: microwave carpet patches, single-board LVP removal
- Typical full-room replacement $3,500–$8,500 vs Chad targeted repair $799–$2,499

## Contact
- Phone/Text: 651-353-6238
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 7:00 AM–5:00 PM
- For fastest quote: Text photos from different angles + first & last name
